designSystem: src/styles.css: .surface-light/.surface-white now remap --surface-medium to #E9E6DB / #F3F1E9 (was inheriting dark green) → fixes 76 prices.tsx color-contrast violations through PriceTable, PriceCoefficients, PricePackageCard note, HouseTechnologyMatrix, HouseTechnologyPrices, ServiceEstimateExample headers.

src/styles.css: .surface-light/.surface-white --warning = #6B4416 (was #8A5E1F); :root --warning = #D4A14E for dark theme — both pass WCAG AA. Fixes DEMO badge contrast on /kalkulyator-stoimosti, /inzhenernye-sistemy, /elektromontazh, /santehnika.
src/components/common/PriceDisclaimer.tsx: bg-muted/40 → bg-muted, text-muted-foreground → text-foreground (drops opacity that confused axe and removed sub-AA contrast).
fixes.linkInTextBlock: src/routes/about.tsx: all in-text Links now use 'text-primary font-semibold underline decoration-2 underline-offset-2' — permanent non-color differentiator (bold + 2px underline).
fixes.scrollableRegions: Added tabIndex={0} role='region' aria-label to overflow-x-auto containers in PriceTable, PriceCoefficients, HouseTechnologyMatrix, HouseTechnologyPrices, ServiceEstimateExample, routes/prices.tsx → fixes 23 scrollable-region-focusable violations.

globalResponsiveTests.remainingOverflow: 11 routes overflow body at 320/360/375px (mobile-specific service pages: /stroitelstvo, /remont, /inzhenernye-sistemy, /elektromontazh, /santehnika, /otoplenie, /krovelnye-raboty, /fundamenty, /kalkulyator-stoimosti, /prices, /privacy). HTML/document level is clipped (overflow-x: clip on body) — no horizontal scrollbar at document level — but body scrollWidth exceeds clientWidth (e.g. 391 vs 320), indicating internal layout still has elements wider than the narrowest mobile widths.

blockingIssues: pageLevelOverflowCount=28 (target=0) — 11 routes need fixes at 320/360/375px. Common culprits likely: fixed min-w-* on hero/price tables, large absolute-positioned hero images, or whitespace-nowrap headlines. Requires per-route triage.
